zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Ragsdale於1510年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾聶頓時，他的父親Robert Ragsdale26歲，母親Ragsdale27歲。他於大約1532年與Catherine Elizabeth Oglethorpe在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾聶頓結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Ragsdale于1510年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾聶頓时，他的父亲Robert Ragsdale26岁，母亲Ragsdale27岁。他于大约1532年与Catherine Elizabeth Oglethorpe在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾聶頓结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆，埋葬在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Ragsdale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire): habitational name from Ragdale (Leicestershire). The placename appears to derive from Old English hraca ‘throat, gulley, narrow pass’ (genitive hracan) + Old Norse dalr ‘valley’. From the 16th century onward the more common form of the surname is Ragsdale with an intrusive -s-.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Ragsdale was born in 1510, in Kneeton, Nottinghamshire, England, his father, Robert Ragsdale, was 26 and his mother, Ragsdale, was 27. He married Catherine Elizabeth Oglethorpe about 1532, in Kneeton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 5 daughters. He died in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Ragsdale est né en 1510, à Kneeton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Ragsdale, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Ragsdale, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Elizabeth Oglethorpe environ 1532, à Kneeton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé à Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Ragsdale 1510 in Kneeton, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Ragsdale 26 und seine Mutter Ragsdale 27. Er hat um 1532 in Kneeton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Catherine Elizabeth Oglethorpe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Ragsdale è nato il nel 1510 nel Kneeton, Nottinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Ragsdale, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Ragsdale, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Elizabeth Oglethorpe circa 1532, nel Kneeton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Ragsdaleが1510年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアネエトンで生まれた時，父Robert Ragsdaleは26歳，母Ragsdaleは27歳であった。約1532年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアネエトンでCatherine Elizabeth Oglethorpeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアノッティンガムで死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアノッティンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Ragsdale(이)가 1510년 영국 노틴그함실르 니턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Ragsdale(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Ragsdale(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1532년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 니턴에서 Catherine Elizabeth Oglethorpe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 노틴그함에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 노틴그함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Ragsdale nasceu em 1510, em Kneeton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Ragsdale, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Ragsdale, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Elizabeth Oglethorpe aproximadamente 1532, em Kneeton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Ragsdale родился в 1510 г. в местности нитон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Ragsdale было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Ragsdale, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Elizabeth Oglethorpe около 1532 г. в местности нитон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер в местности ноттингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности ноттингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Ragsdale nació en 1510, en Kneeton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Ragsdale, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Ragsdale, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Catherine Elizabeth Oglethorpe aproximadamente 1532, en Kneeton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
